mapper.select: SELECT post_id, post_name, version FROM m_post ORDER BY post_id ASC
SELECT post_name FROM m_post WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM m_post WHERE post_name = #{postName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_post( post_name, first_create_date, last_modified_date, last_modified_user ) VALUES( #{postName}, #{firstCreateDate}, #{lastModifiedDate}, #{lastModifiedUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT post_id, post_name, version FROM m_post WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE m_post SET post_name = #{postName}, last_modified_date = #{lastModifiedDate}, last_modified_user = #{lastModifiedUser}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND version = #{version}
